content.body: Further to the TLS crypto sheet I put together, I got the robots to do a survey of the web crypto and various crypto using web platform APIs, along with internal chrome usage.  The results are here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1_Ri-h_OfAKA9AouvPwj4SLLxX3z4ue9XpC1Ro__c24Y/edit?gid=1677021140#gid=1677021140
It does include https://wicg.github.io/webcrypto-modern-algos/ which is still work in progress.
Though talking of work in progress, one of my colleagues flagged a more substantive issue with Annex K as currently worded.
